purpose: Machine-readable record of discovery, review, normalization, risk, catalog, and package value events.

events.summary: Installed board-driven heartbeat protocol so Skills operators prioritize discovery restoration, risk review, package-facing skill quality, and catalog parity over status-only churn.

events.source: Skills Value Operator board ticket skills-restore-discovery-handoff-001
events.summary: Consumed the discovery handoff repair ticket, confirmed canonical latest.json is absent while producer workflow/scripts exist, documented the connector-visible blocker, queued a metadata-only manual discovery fallback, and preserved package/risk gates.

events.source: Skills Value Operator board ticket skills-risk-review-mcp-tool-poisoning-001
events.summary: Removed a package-facing risk blocker by converting the MCP/tool-poisoning and SSRF audit skill into a high-risk, requires_review defensive wrapper. Default executable probing, SSRF target lists, unauthenticated endpoint probe commands, and MCP tool-call snippets were removed while preserving authorized static review, fingerprinting, severity scoring, and remediation workflow. Catalog parity is now the next gate.

Verified catalog/install-manifest parity after the MCP/tool-poisoning and SSRF risk review. dist/catalog.json and dist/catalog.md reflect security-defensive/high/requires_review metadata for the skill, and dist/install-manifest.json remains coherent for installer selection. No generated catalog surface was hand-edited and no npm publication was attempted. Manual discovery fallback is now the next value ticket.

events.source: Skills Value Operator board ticket skills-manual-discovery-fallback-001
events.summary: Consumed the manual discovery fallback ticket after the canonical discovery Action handoff remained absent. Recorded four real public metadata-only candidates: modelcontextprotocol/servers, vercel/ai, QuantaAlpha/GitTaskBench, and openclaw/openclaw. Classified three as review_next and one as watch, opened a source-review queue, and preserved no-clone/no-execute/no-copy/no-normalize/no-package/no-publication boundaries.
